name: Quick Onion Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds lean beef pot roast, trimmed of all fat.
3 tablespoons water, mixed to a paste.
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the roast in the slow cooker.
2. Pour accumulated juices into a saucepan and skim off any excess fat.
3. Add the flour-water paste and bring to a boil, stirring constantly until thickened.
4. Serve over sliced meat.
